# @atom63/slides — Template Reference

Machine-generated from the live `@atom63/slides` template registry (`listTemplates()`). Covers all 20 author-facing templates with their direct props, compound slots (name · `min..max` · props), and a minimal MDX usage example synthesized from the schema.

Import any template by name from `@atom63/slides`. Replace every `…` placeholder and every `/images/placeholder-1920x1080.webp` with real content before shipping.

## Templates by category

- **Cover** — `CoverSlide`, `FullBleedCoverSlide`
- **Statement & Section** — `SectionSlide`, `StatementSlide`
- **Quote** — `QuoteSlide`, `QuoteWithMedia`
- **Media** — `FullBleedSlide`, `HeroBento`, `MediaTrio`, `TextLead`, `ImageSlide`, `ImageDuoSlide`
- **Gallery** — `Collage`, `FullBleedGallery`, `ImageTrioSlide`
- **Data & Stats** — `StatBento`, `SplitWithStat`, `TimelineBento`
- **Split** — `SplitHalf`
- **Closing** — `ClosingSlide`

## Cover

### CoverSlide

**Editorial cover** · category `cover`

**Props**

| Prop | Kind | Required | Label |
|---|---|---|---|
| `title` | text | yes | Title |
| `subtitle` | richtext | no | Subtitle |
| `eyebrow` | text | no | Eyebrow |
| `credit` | text | no | Credit |
| `logo` | richtext | no | Logo |

**Example**

```mdx
<CoverSlide
  title="Title…"
  subtitle="Subtitle…"
  eyebrow="Eyebrow…"
  credit="Credit…"
  logo="Logo…"
/>
```

### FullBleedCoverSlide

**Full-bleed cover** · category `cover`

**Props**

| Prop | Kind | Required | Label |
|---|---|---|---|
| `title` | text | yes | Title |
| `subtitle` | richtext | no | Subtitle |
| `eyebrow` | text | no | Eyebrow |
| `credit` | text | no | Credit |
| `mediaSrc` | media | yes | Background media |
| `mediaAlt` | text | no | Media alt text |
| `mastheadLabel` | text | no | Masthead label |

**Example**

```mdx
<FullBleedCoverSlide
  title="Title…"
  subtitle="Subtitle…"
  eyebrow="Eyebrow…"
  credit="Credit…"
  mediaSrc="/images/placeholder-1920x1080.webp"
  mediaAlt="Media alt text…"
  mastheadLabel="Masthead label…"
/>
```

### ClosingSlide

**Closing / colophon** · category `closing`

**Props**

| Prop | Kind | Required | Label |

```mdx
/>
```
